author: phfarath
name: qTTT (Q-only TTT) + AdamW TTT + T=0.98 + QK-Gain 5.5 on PR #1493 base
technique_summary: PR #1493 base + AdamW TTT (lr=0.001) + qTTT (only c_q.weight, 11 tensors, 2.88M of 35.9M params) + post-TTT temperature 0.98 (in sliding + TTT scoring) + QK-Gain init 5.5 (was 5.25)

sota_at_submission.note: Submission is +0.0080 BPB worse than merged SOTA (PR #1493). Submitted as a documented negative result; see README for ablation showing why.

TTT_QUERY_ONLY=0_full_TTT_AdamW_seed42.note: Full TTT (35.9M params) with AdamW lr=0.001 on this depth-recurrent base catastrophically degrades the quantized model. qTTT acts as strong mitigation but does not recover positive TTT gain.
